title: Python: Add queue latency metrics to simulator
description:
Add queue_stats tracking to Python simulator/node:

1. Track packet timestamps on enqueue
2. Calculate latency on dequeue
3. Separate drop counters (deadline vs full)
4. Expose via node status or diagnostics

Fields per spec:
- packets_queued
- packets_dropped_deadline  
- packets_dropped_full
- max_latency_ms
- avg_latency_ms

Reference: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md lines 138-152
